reviews.comment:
Al momento de cobrar el playero se fue con la tarjeta no se a donde , me dio el ticket con el documento y la tarjeta YPF , y la tarjeta de crédito quedó ahí , no se hacen cargo de enviarla , ya les va llegar la CD, por la molestias ocasionadas besitos

(Translated by Google)
When I paid, the attendant took my card somewhere, I don't know where. He gave me the receipt with my ID and the YPF card, but my credit card was left there. They're not taking responsibility for sending it back. They'll be getting a letter of complaint soon. For the inconvenience, kisses.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtelBMQmx3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Cargamos nafta y compramos en el shop y no les andaba ninguna aplicación, ni los puntos ni el descuento 😢

(Translated by Google)
We filled up with gas and bought something at the store, but none of the apps worked, neither the points nor the discount.
